description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - OSX/Linux via Conda that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a job named Pinocchio on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest operating systems in both Release and Debug build modes with Conda. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up caching for ccache, install Miniconda, activate the pinocchio environment, install cmake and dependencies, build Pinocchio with specific configuration, run tests, and uninstall Pinocchio.
